# CaptionMoji AI - Viral AI Caption & Emoji Generator

Turn your text into viral captions with smart emojis in seconds. Generate Instagram, WhatsApp, and Shorts captions with AI (Hindi + Hinglish + English). Trusted by 10,000+ creators.

## Key Features
- Viral Mode: High-energy, excitement, scroll-stopping hooks.
- Funny Mode: Humor, sarcasm, relatable jokes.
- Romantic Mode: Emotional depth, softness, connection.
- Sad Mode: Deep emotional tone, relatable and expressive.
- Hook Mode: Irresistible attention-grabbing first line.
- Normal Mode: Simple but enhanced and engaging.

## Visual Styles
- Aesthetic: ✨🌸🌿💫
- Fire: 🔥💯⚡🚀
- Dark: 🖤🥀🌑
- Minimal: Very limited emojis
